name: tnl-intelligence-workspace
description: Developer tools for The Neural Ledger intelligence API.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @theneuralledger/sdk && npm run build --workspace @theneuralledger/mcp && npm run build --workspace @theneuralledger/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run build && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.lint:python: cd python/tnl_intelligence && python3 -m ruff check . && python3 -m ruff format --check . && python3 -m mypy src
scripts.validate: npm run openapi:check && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
